content.query:
SELECT      i.item
,           i.descr
,           i.um
,           i.product_line
,           i.upc1
,           i.vendor
,           i.ship_length
,           i.ship_width
,           i.ship_height
,           i.weight
,           AVG(WI.list_price) as msrp
,           AVG(WI.std_cost) as std_cost
FROM        ADC.ITEM I
JOIN        ADC.wa_item WI on i.item = WI.item
WHERE       I.COMPANY_IT = 'AD'
AND         WI.COMPANY_IT = 'AD'
GROUP BY    i.item
,           i.descr
,           i.um
,           i.product_line
,           i.upc1
,           i.vendor
,           i.ship_length
,           i.ship_width
,           i.ship_height
,           i.weight
